project_context.locked_colors: violet primary, slate neutrals, emerald accent

typography.font_size_mobile_inputs: 16px minimum to prevent iOS zoom (already applied globally by main agent).
typography.hierarchy: Maintain clean UI, prioritize clarity. Respect existing locked styles.

spacing_and_layout.mobile_first: Start with grid-cols-1. Stack columns vertically on mobile viewports (<640px).
spacing_and_layout.padding_containers: Use p-4 or p-6 internally in dialogs. Never allow text to hit screen edges.

safe_area_guidelines.header_topbar: Crucial: Apply `pt-safe` to the sticky top bar. Change height constraints (like `h-16`) to `min-h-[calc(4rem+env(safe-area-inset-top))]` or `h-auto` so it scales with the notch.
safe_area_guidelines.page_containers: Apply `pt-safe` and `pb-safe` to full-screen pages like Login, Register, Landing.
safe_area_guidelines.modals: Apply `pb-safe` to dialog/modal footers to avoid the iOS home indicator overlapping buttons.

touch_targets.minimum_size: Buttons, inputs, selects must have a minimum touch target of 44x44px for iOS. Ensure full-width buttons on mobile for easier thumb reach.

1_safe_area_topbar.action: Locate the sticky topbar (approx line 338). It currently gets hidden under the notch. Add `pt-safe` class. Ensure its height adjusts correctly (e.g. `h-auto min-h-[4rem]` or `box-content h-16 pt-safe`). Verify header buttons and user menus are fully clickable below the iOS status bar.

2_login_and_register_pages.action: Ensure the outermost container wrapper has `pt-safe` and `pb-safe` so the forms are not obscured by the notch or home bar. Add padding to the top if the logo/back button overlaps the status bar.

3_form_responsiveness.action: Sweep all forms and dialogs. Replace rigid grids like `grid-cols-2` with `grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2`. Ensure all 2-column or 3-column form layouts properly stack on mobile. Verify input fields do not cause horizontal scrolling.

4_dialog_footers_and_buttons.targets: All usages of DialogFooter in the above form files.
4_dialog_footers_and_buttons.action: Ensure buttons in the DialogFooter stack cleanly on mobile. Use `flex-col sm:flex-row w-full` for the footer wrapper, and `w-full sm:w-auto` for the action buttons inside, so they span full-width on mobile but sit side-by-side on desktop.

5_dialog_overflow.action: Main agent added `max-h-[92dvh] overflow-y-auto`. Verify this is robust. Additionally, make sure `pb-safe` is applied to DialogContent so content isn't clipped by the iOS home bar.

6_touch_targets.action: Ensure inputs and clickable buttons inside forms have adequate height. If they are standard `h-10`, consider adding `sm:h-10 h-11` or minimum height CSS for better mobile tap reliability.

7_service_worker.action: Bump the cache version (e.g., from `v67-ios-pwa-safe-area-mobile-forms` to `v68-ios-pwa-safe-area-mobile-forms-v2`) to deploy the updated PWA CSS/JS layouts.
